fx_bad_mode.json.reason: mode not in the schema enum

fx_broken_stair.json.reason: stair rises 1.8 m per step: physically unclimbable

fx_orphan_ladder.json.reason: ladder with no declared role: leads nowhere in the circulation contract

fx_pvp_no_defender.json.reason: no defender spawn: nothing defends the objective

fx_pvp_single_route.json.reason: objective reachable by a single unavoidable route

fx_pvp_spawn_los.json.reason: opposing spawns share a direct clear sightline

fx_pvp_spawn_oob.json.reason: spawn marker far outside the playable envelope

fx_sealed_box.json.reason: no exterior opening of any kind: a sealed box no body can enter

fx_unreachable_room.json.reason: walled_cell has no opening: no agent can ever reach it
